tasks.name: Content Generate
tasks.command: python3 -c "from core.router.dispatcher import TaskDispatcher; from core.tasks.models import TaskRequest; r=TaskDispatcher().dispatch(TaskRequest(prompt='Ecris un post LinkedIn court sur un sujet IA tendance',task_type='fast')); open('data/generated-post-latest.txt','w').write(str(r.output))"

tasks.name: Morning Startup
tasks.command: python3 -c "from core.workflows import morning_startup; import json; print(json.dumps(morning_startup(), indent=2, default=str))"

tasks.name: EOD Report
tasks.command: python3 -c "from core.workflows import end_of_day; import json; print(json.dumps(end_of_day(), indent=2))"
